notableEvents.label: Blaze Alexander plunked
notableEvents.detail: Blaze Alexander hit by pitch. Coby Mayo to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Blaze Alexander reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Blaze Alexander reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Tanner Murray.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by catcher Edgar Quero on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Tyler O'Neill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler O'Neill singles on a fly ball to center fielder Luisangel Acuña. Samuel Basallo to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Mountcastle pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Mountcastle grounds out, shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Lenyn Sosa. Samuel Basallo scores.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Tanner Murray reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Pete Alonso, assist to shortstop Blaze Alexander. Colson Montgomery to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Tyler O'Neill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler O'Neill singles on a fly ball to center fielder Luisangel Acuña.

notableEvents.label: Tyler O'Neill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler O'Neill pops out to shortstop Colson Montgomery.

notableEvents.label: Blaze Alexander GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Blaze Alexander grounds into a double play, third baseman Tanner Murray to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Lenyn Sosa. Coby Mayo out at 2nd. Blaze Alexander out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Blaze Alexander rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Blaze Alexander grounds into a double play, third baseman Tanner Murray to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Lenyn Sosa. Coby Mayo out at 2nd. Blaze Alexander out at 1st.
